items.title: T.N. Governor cuts security convoy size after PM Modi’s austerity appeal
items.summary: As many as 10 security vehicles accompanied the Governor when he participated in government and private functions; the number has now been reduced to four
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: At least eight killed, 25 injured as train hits bus in Bangkok
items.summary: A train crashed into a public bus near an airport rail link station Bangkok's city centre, Thai media report.
